name: Unisex Lightweight Packable Puffer Jacket
description: Ultralight packable down jacket that stuffs into its own pocket for easy travel. 700-fill-power responsibly sourced down with a water-resistant recycled ripstop shell. The perfect layer for chilly mornings and cool evenings.
specs: 100% recycled polyester ripstop shell with DWR finish, 700-fill-power RDS-certified goose down, Water-resistant, wind-resistant, Packable into interior zip pocket, Elastic-bound cuffs and hem, Two zippered hand pockets, Machine wash cold gentle cycle, Tumble dry low with tennis balls, Sizes XS through 3XL unisex fit
warranty: Lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects. 60-day satisfaction guarantee — return for any reason.
shipping: Free standard shipping on all orders. Standard delivery 3-5 business days. Express 1-2 day shipping available for $9.99.
